title: Origins: Evolutionary Morphling
description: Adds an Evolving Morphling Origin that starts of weak at the beggining but can be upgraded as you progress in the game using advancements!
body:
### Short Introduction
This datapack adds a new Origin for the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins/), Morphling.

Morphling is an Evolving Origin that starts of weak with limited abilities but upgrades/changes as you complete specific challenges via custom advancements. \
You start as a water creature, being able to walk on water and swim faster in it and at the end can switch to different forms you unlock along the way which include rapid dash movement and shooting small fireballs!

If you wish to know in detail what the origin does consider looking at the [Wiki Page on Github](https://github.com/JustCyra/Morphling-Origin/wiki/)!

### REQUIRED MODS
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins/) *for adding the Origin*
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui/) *for Model Scaling*
- [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli/) *for Custom Powers*

### OPTIONAL MODS
- [Origin Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes/) *Morphling adds some Class Synergy*

### FAQ

**Q:** After an update some/most of my abilities do not work! \
**A:** Just rejoin the singleplayer/multiplayer world once or twice and it should function properly again, otherwise remember to report it using Feedback tools 

**Q:** Is the **Apugli** mod necessary? \
**A:** Yes, it adds critical powers to make some parts of the origin function. However if you already have mods that contain **Apugli** as part of the mod, such as [TooManyOrigins](https://modrinth.com/mod/toomanyorigins), it is not required as those mods already have it unless it is outdated.

### Feedback
Found a bug or want to request a feature? \
You can report bugs or request features on the [Issue Tracker on Github](https://github.com/JustCyra/Morphling-Origin/issues/)!

### Credit and Usage
By downloading this origin you agree to not republish or repost this origin on other sites or sell it for profit. \
If you show this origin on any platform or feature it on a server be sure to credit me as the creator of the origin.
